parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (name, contact_name, contact_email)
VALUES ('{{ $json.body.client_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.body.contact_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.body.contact_email || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET contact_name = EXCLUDED.contact_name, contact_email = EXCLUDED.contact_email
RETURNING id, name;

INSERT INTO engagements (client_id, name, type, testing_window_start, testing_window_end, rate_limit_profile, prohibited_actions, evidence_handling_notes, emergency_contact)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.engagement_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  '{{ $json.testing_window_start }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.testing_window_end }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.rate_limit_profile }}',
  '[{{ $json.prohibited_actions }}]'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.evidence_handling_notes ? "'" + $json.evidence_handling_notes + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.emergency_contact }}'
)
RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO engagement_metrics (engagement_id) VALUES ('{{ $('Prepare Scope SQL').first().json.engagement_id }}') ON CONFLICT (engagement_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, engagement_id, entity_type, entity_id, payload)
VALUES ('engagement_created', 'api', '{{ $('Prepare Scope SQL').first().json.engagement_id }}', 'engagement', '{{ $('Prepare Scope SQL').first().json.engagement_id }}', '{"source":"WF01"}'::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, engagement_id: $('Prepare Scope SQL').first().json.engagement_id, message: 'Engagement created. Scope rules loaded. Recon will begin at next scheduled window.' }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-01: Creates a new pentest engagement with scope, authorization rules, and testing windows. POST /webhook/recon-os/engagement/new
